name: Starter category and disambiguation rules for transaction enrichment
description: Rules are intended to run after descriptor cleaning and before/alongside MCC fallback. Higher priority wins. User-created rules should use priority above 2000.

evaluationGuidance.priority: Sort descending. First high-confidence exact merchant rules should beat generic category rules.
evaluationGuidance.containsAll: All listed phrases must be present.
evaluationGuidance.notContainsAny: Skip rule if any listed phrase is present.
evaluationGuidance.regexAny: Use cautiously; regex strings are JSON escaped and should be compiled case-insensitively.
evaluationGuidance.amountSign: Optional hint: debit, credit, or either. Use it to distinguish income/refunds/ATM withdrawals.
evaluationGuidance.result: May set merchantId, displayName, category, subcategory, processor, or tags.

rules.name: Brazilian installment marker (PARC n/m)
rules.notes: Annotation-only rule: apply the tag and continue matching for merchant/category.

rules.name: Mexican months-without-interest marker (MSI)
rules.notes: Annotation-only rule: apply the tag and continue matching for merchant/category.

rules.name: Brazilian IOF tax on FX transactions
Portuguese gym words
rules.notes: In BR descriptors 'academia' is overwhelmingly a gym, not a school.
